# OpenSIN Development Environment Setup

> Complete setup guide for OpenSIN development — macOS, OCI VM, Docker, Cloud Storage

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/dev-setup/blob/main/README.md) - Quick start, features, architecture
- [macOS Setup Guide](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/dev-setup/blob/main/macOS-dev-setup.md) - Local development on Mac
- [OCI Setup Guide](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/dev-setup/blob/main/OCI-dev-setup.md) - Oracle Cloud A1.Flex VM setup
- [OpenCode CLI Setup](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/dev-setup/blob/main/opencode-dev-setup.md) - OpenCode CLI installation
- [Docker Setup](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/dev-setup/blob/main/opencode-docker-build/) - Docker development
- [Box Storage Guide](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/dev-setup/blob/main/box-storage.md) - Box.com integration
- [Contributing](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/dev-setup/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) - How to contribute
- [Security Policy](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/dev-setup/blob/main/SECURITY.md) - Security policy
- [Changelog](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/dev-setup/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md) - Version history

## Key Information

- License: Apache 2.0
- Languages: Bash, Python, YAML, Markdown
- Platforms: macOS, Oracle Cloud (OCI), Docker
- Tech Stack: Homebrew, Git, Bun, Python, Docker, VS Code, OpenCode CLI
- Cloud Region: Frankfurt eu-frankfurt-1 (OCI)
- Cloud VM: Always-Free A1.Flex (4 OCPUs, 24 GB RAM)
- Storage: Box.com (10 GB free)
- Repo: https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/dev-setup

## What This Project Does

This is the **central setup documentation system** for OpenSIN-AI developers. It provides step-by-step guides for:

1. **macOS Development Environment** - Set up a MacBook as a full development machine with Homebrew, Git, Node.js (Bun), Python, Docker
2. **Oracle Cloud Infrastructure VM** - Create a free A1.Flex cloud VM in Frankfurt with Ubuntu 22.04/24.04 LTS
3. **Docker Development** - Containerized development with Docker and Docker Compose
4. **Cloud Storage** - Box.com integration for logs, screenshots, backups (10 GB free)
5. **OpenCode CLI** - Installation and configuration of the OpenCode CLI for A2A agent control

## Architecture

- Local MacBook → VS Code Remote SSH → OCI VM
- Docker containers on both local Mac and OCI VM
- Box.com cloud storage for persistent file backup
- GitHub Templates (Issues, PRs) — Automatisierung via n8n + A2A-SIN-GitHub-Action auf OCI VM

## Quick Start Commands

```bash
# macOS setup
./setup-mac.sh

# Clone and explore
git clone https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/dev-setup.git
cd dev-setup

# SSH to OCI VM (after setup)
ssh -i ~/.ssh/oci_key ubuntu@<VM_IP>

# Docker on OCI
docker run -d -p 80:80 nginx
```
